role: Clerical member of the Guardian Council (reappointed 2022)
bio: Mehdi Shabzendedar Jahromi is a clerical member of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council), reappointed by [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) in July 2022 alongside [Mohammad-Reza Modarresi Yazdi](/people/mohammad-reza-modarresi-yazdi). He is one of the six faqih members directly appointed by the Supreme Leader to serve on the Council.
editorial_notes: Birth year not publicly confirmed. Reappointed July 2022 by Khamenei.
